description:
Authors: Suri, G. and Slater, L. R. and Ziaee, A. and Nguyen, M.
Title: Do large language models show decision heuristics similar to humans? A case study using GPT-3.5
Journal: Journal of Experimental Psychology: General
Year: 2024
Volume: 153
reason: Multiple authoritative sources (arXiv, CrossRef, OpenAlex) confirm the existence of the paper with matching authors, title, journal, and year. The paper was first released as arXiv:2305.04400 in 2023 and published in Journal of Experimental Psychology: General in 2024 (volume 153, DOI 10.1037/xge0001547).
